name: Outrageously Oatmeal Bread for Bread Machine
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the ingredients for a regular loaf in order: water, white bread flour, dry milk, salt, butter, honey, rolled oats, and fast rise yeast (or active dry yeast).
2. Place the dough in the bread machine pan.
3. Select the regular bake cycle or press "beep" at the end of the fruit and nut cycle for a large loaf.
4. For added texture, mix in additional oats after the first knead or wait until the beep to add them during the fruit and nut cycle.
5. For extra crunch, sprinkle a few rolled oats on top before baking.
6. Use quick-cooking oats; instant oatmeal does not work.
Calories: 166
Protein: 11%
Cholesterol: 4.87mg
Carbohydrates: 76%
Sodium: 265mg
Fat: 13%
